methodsAttempted.query: Atti di indirizzo e linee guida ChatGPT Università di Siena
methodsAttempted.notes: The official Atti di indirizzo e linee guida index lists the ChatGPT/LLM guidelines and links to the PDF.
Robots.txt allows the public guideline, news, and index paths used here; login/search/admin paths were not accessed.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery located a University of Siena ChatGPT/LLM guideline PDF listed in the university's Atti di indirizzo e linee guida section and an official announcement stating the guidelines were approved by the Academic Senate on 11 July 2023. Claims are limited to the guideline text and its official listing. Degree pages and research-repository PDFs were rejected as non-policy context.

artifacts.notes: Approved as source-status claim only; official news and index support publication/approval status, while operative policy details rely on the primary PDF.
Claim is narrowly scoped to training and updates described in guideline point 1.
Claim follows guideline point 2 and avoids overclaiming a ban or tool approval.
Approved because the source explicitly states improper chatbot use is sanctioned by the code of conduct.
Approved because guideline point 7 uses mandatory disclosure wording for authors of listed academic writings.
Approved as a privacy/data-handling caution; it does not claim a complete data protection policy.

artifacts.title: University of Siena ChatGPT and LLM guidance crawl
artifacts.summary: The staged crawl found official University of Siena guidance for ChatGPT and other LLMs. The strongest source is an Italian PDF linked from the university's Atti di indirizzo e linee guida section. Evidence supports narrow claims about training, teaching-integrity guidance, sanctions for improper chatbot use in student work, disclosure of AI use in certain writings, and care when personal data is processed.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
Claims are based on public official University of Siena sources available during this crawl and are not marked human reviewed.
Announcement and course pages were recorded only as context or rejected sources where they did not provide operative policy text.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
